messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Write a python-pptx script creating a 5-slide minimalist presentation for Executive Leadership on our Corporate Rebranding Overview. Use high-end large hero images and concise taglines. Save as "Rebrand_Overview.pptx". All text must be in French, formatted to fit a 16:9 Widescreen slide size orientation. Do not use any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from lxml import etree as OxmlElement


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

NAVY = "#0A1628"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
GOLD = "#C9A227"
LIGHT_GRAY = "#F4F4F4"
CHARCOAL = "#1A1A1A"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, x, y, w, h, text, font_size=18, bold=False,
                 color=CHARCOAL, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name="Calibri"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, w, h)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, x, y, w, h, fill_color=WHITE, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(fill_color)
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, x, y, width, height, label_text, accent_color=GOLD):
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y + Inches(0.15), width, Inches(0.04))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y + Inches(0.28), width, height)
    tf = label_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = label_text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(11)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
    run.font.name = "Calibri"


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, x, y, w, h):
    import os
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, x, y, w, h)
        return

    placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
    placeholder.fill.solid()
    placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GRAY)
    placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
    placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)

    icon_size = Inches(0.6)
    cx = x + (w - icon_size) / 2
    cy = y + (h - icon_size) / 2
    line1 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, cx, cy, icon_size, Pt(3))
    line1.fill.solid()
    line1.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
    line1.line.fill.background()

    line2 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, cx + icon_size / 2 - Pt(1.5), cy, Pt(3), icon_size)
    line2.fill.solid()
    line2.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
    line2.line.fill.background()


def add_footer_bar(slide, slide_num, total=5):
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(7.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.4))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(NAVY)
    bar.line.fill.background()

    page_text = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(6.5), Inches(7.12), Inches(3), Inches(0.35))
    tf = page_text.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"{slide_num} / {total}"
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
    run.font.name = "Calibri"


def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, NAVY)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/hero_rebrand.jpg", Inches(0.5), Inches(0.8), Inches(7.5), Inches(5.9))

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(8.3), Inches(2.6), Inches(1.5), Pt(4))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(8.3), Inches(2.9), Inches(4.5), Inches(1.2))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "APERÇU DU\nREBRANDING"
    run.font.size = Pt(48)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    run.font.name = "Calibri"

    subtitle_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(8.3), Inches(4.2), Inches(4.5), Inches(0.6))
    tf2 = subtitle_box.text_frame
    p2 = tf2.paragraphs[0]
    p2.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run2 = p2.add_run()
    run2.text = "Présentation au Conseil d'Administration"
    run2.font.size = Pt(18)
    run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
    run2.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_footer_bar(slide, 1)


def build_brand_evolution_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, NAVY)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/brand_history.jpg", Inches(0.6), Inches(1.4), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5))

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(6), Inches(0.3), "ÉVOLUTION DE NOTRE MARQUE")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(6.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(6), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "UNE NOUVELLE IDENTITÉ"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    run.font.name = "Calibri"

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(6.5), Inches(3.0), Inches(6), Inches(2.8))
    tf2 = body_box.text_frame
    tf2.word_wrap = True
    p2 = tf2.paragraphs[0]
    p2.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run2 = p2.add_run()
    run2.text = "Notre rebranding reflète notre vision pour l'avenir. Cette transformation renforce notre positionnement, modernise notre image et aligne nos valeurs avec les attentes de nos parties prenantes."
    run2.font.size = Pt(16)
    run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    run2.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_footer_bar(slide, 2)


def build_visual_identity_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.7), Inches(0.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "IDENTITÉ VISUELLE"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(NAVY)
    run.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(1.2), Inches(5), Inches(0.3), "ÉLÉMENTS CLÉS")

    card_data = [
        ("LOGO", "Nouveau logo simplifié et moderne reflétant notre ambition"),
        ("PALETTE", "Couleurs principales : bleu marine, or et blanc pur"),
        ("TYPOGRAPHIE", "Calibri pour la clarté et l'élégance professionnelle"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(3.8)
    card_height = Inches(2.5)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = Inches(0.7)
    y_pos = Inches(1.8)

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(card_data):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        card = add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, WHITE, GOLD)

        title_box2 = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.3), y_pos + Inches(0.4), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5))
        tf_t = title_box2.text_frame
        p_t = tf_t.paragraphs[0]
        p_t.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
        run_t = p_t.add_run()
        run_t.text = title
        run_t.font.size = Pt(16)
        run_t.font.bold = True
        run_t.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
        run_t.font.name = "Calibri"

        desc_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.3), y_pos + Inches(1.2), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0))
        tf_d = desc_box.text_frame
        p_d = tf_d.paragraphs[0]
        p_d.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
        run_d = p_d.add_run()
        run_d.text = desc
        run_d.font.size = Pt(13)
        run_d.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CHARCOAL)
        run_d.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_footer_bar(slide, 3)


def build_messaging_pillars_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, NAVY)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/brand_values.jpg", Inches(0.6), Inches(1.4), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5))

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(6), Inches(0.3), "PILIERS DE NOTRE MESSAGE")

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(6.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(6), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "NOTRE PROMESSE"
    run.font.size = Pt(36)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    run.font.name = "Calibri"

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(6.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(6), Inches(0.5))
    tf2 = body_box.text_frame
    p2 = tf2.paragraphs[0]
    p2.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run2 = p2.add_run()
    run2.text = "Les fondements de notre communication"
    run2.font.size = Pt(16)
    run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
    run2.font.name = "Calibri"

    pillars = [
        ("INNOVATION", "Pousser les limites du possible"),
        ("FIABILITÉ", "L'excellence à chaque interaction"),
        ("ENGAGEMENT", "Bâtir des relations durables"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(1.8)
    card_height = Inches(2.0)
    gap = Inches(0.35)
    start_x = Inches(6.5)
    y_pos = Inches(3.4)

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(pillars):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        card = add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, WHITE, GOLD)

        title_box2 = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.15), y_pos + Inches(0.3), card_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4))
        tf_t = title_box2.text_frame
        p_t = tf_t.paragraphs[0]
        p_t.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run_t = p_t.add_run()
        run_t.text = title
        run_t.font.size = Pt(13)
        run_t.font.bold = True
        run_t.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
        run_t.font.name = "Calibri"

        desc_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.15), y_pos + Inches(0.9), card_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.8))
        tf_d = desc_box.text_frame
        p_d = tf_d.paragraphs[0]
        p_d.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run_d = p_d.add_run()
        run_d.text = desc
        run_d.font.size = Pt(11)
        run_d.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CHARCOAL)
        run_d.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_footer_bar(slide, 4)


def build_call_to_action_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, NAVY)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/cta_hero.jpg", Inches(0.5), Inches(0.8), Inches(7.5), Inches(5.9))

    accent_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(2.5), Inches(1.6), Inches(3), Pt(4))
    accent_line.fill.solid()
    accent_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(2.5), Inches(1.9), Inches(8.3), Inches(0.8))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "REJOIGNEZ-NOUS"
    run.font.size = Pt(48)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    run.font.name = "Calibri"

    subtitle_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(2.5), Inches(2.9), Inches(8.3), Inches(0.6))
    tf2 = subtitle_box.text_frame
    p2 = tf2.paragraphs[0]
    p2.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run2 = p2.add_run()
    run2.text = "Embrassons ensemble cette nouvelle identité de marque"
    run2.font.size = Pt(18)
    run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
    run2.font.name = "Calibri"

    actions = [
        ("REJOINDRE L'ÉQUIPE", "Participez au déploiement du rebranding"),
        ("RESSOURCES", "Accédez aux guides et supports de marque"),
        ("RENDEZ-VOUS", "Planifiez une session d'information"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(3.5)
    card_height = Inches(1.8)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = Inches(2.5)
    y_pos = Inches(4.8)

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(actions):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        card = add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, WHITE, GOLD)

        title_box2 = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.3), y_pos + Inches(0.3), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4))
        tf_t = title_box2.text_frame
        p_t = tf_t.paragraphs[0]
        p_t.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run_t = p_t.add_run()
        run_t.text = title
        run_t.font.size = Pt(15)
        run_t.font.bold = True
        run_t.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
        run_t.font.name = "Calibri"

        desc_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.3), y_pos + Inches(0.9), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5))
        tf_d = desc_box.text_frame
        p_d = tf_d.paragraphs[0]
        p_d.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run_d = p_d.add_run()
        run_d.text = desc
        run_d.font.size = Pt(12)
        run_d.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CHARCOAL)
        run_d.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_footer_bar(slide, 5)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_brand_evolution_slide(prs)
    build_visual_identity_slide(prs)
    build_messaging_pillars_slide(prs)
    build_call_to_action_slide(prs)

    prs.save("Rebrand_Overview.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
